protein_name: Does not appear to have detectable kinase activity. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. CAMK Ser/Thr protein kinase family. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: modulation of chemical synaptic transmission; regulation of modification of postsynaptic structure; signal transduction
